purpose: Normalize SK source intake around the common source-to-claim harness. SK has financial and narrative seed claims, but some document URL ledger records still need reconciliation before broader claim promotion.

sourcePackages.name: SK Hynix memory and HBM narrative
SK Innovation energy and battery narrative
SK Inc. portfolio and shareholder value narrative
SK Telecom telecom, AI, and data-center narrative
SK Square ICT investment and portfolio narrative

acceptanceChecklist: Every narrative claim has companyId and companyScope.
Every runtime source has document-level public URL or DART receipt URL.
Placeholder URLs remain excluded from runtime claim promotion.
Unmatched URL records remain backlog until reconciled to local files or dropped with reason.
runtimePolicy: SK source material is runtime-eligible only after source-backed claim promotion with company scope, evidence locator, rights-safe URL metadata, and forward-looking labels where needed.
